subcodes.first_line: This is the station of submission and contentment. It behooveth whosoever hath quaffed the choice wine of immortality from the hand of bounty, He Who hath been named [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا مقام التسلیم و الرضا ینبغی لمن شرب رحیق البقاء من ید العطاء الذی سمی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
